title: obione spinibractea
side_effects: Obione spinibractea can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal problems, including diarrhea, stomach cramps, and nausea, which can lead to dehydration and electrolyte imbalances. In some cases, excessive consumption can cause liver damage, as well as allergic reactions, such as hives and itching. Improper use of the plant can also interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners and diabetes medications, leading to adverse effects. Furthermore, improper handling and processing of Obione spinibractea can lead to contamination, resulting in infections and other health complications.
